turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Call in Pivot Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, I need to reschedule an appointment I already have.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I see you're calling from the number we have on file. Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, that's me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It's June 12, 1990.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You have an appointment scheduled for Tuesday, July 14th, at 9:30 a.m. with Dr. Zig Mill dowski at Nashville, 220 Athens Way is this the appointment you want to reschedule?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Actually, I think it’s for Tuesday, July 18th. Can I reschedule that one?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I have your appointment as Tuesday, July 14th at 9:30 a.m. there is no appointment listed for July 18th.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I’m pretty sure it’s July 18th. Can you check again for me?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I always see an appointment for July 14th at 9:30 a.m. there is nothing scheduled for July 18th.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Okay, let’s go ahead and reschedule the July 14th appointment then. What weekday afternoons do you have available?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To a different date and time.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, I’d like to move it to a weekday afternoon. What options do you have?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check for available Tuesday, afternoon. Appointments to reschedule your visit

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I’m looking for any weekday afternoon, not just Tuesday. Do you have other options?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Appointment is Monday July 13th at 10:30 a.m. there are also openings on Tuesday, July 14th at 10:00 a.m. and 3:00 p.m. would you like to move your appointment to 1 of these times? Or do you want to look for other dates?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I think you meant Monday, July 17th, not the 13th. Can I get the 3:00 p.m. slot on July 14th?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Monday available is July  13th.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I see. Can we just go with the 3:00 p.m. slot on July 14th then?
